name: Basic .NET service migration
prompt: Migrate this repo to GitHub Actions. The health URL pattern is productsanswersreader.api.dev-legalshield.com/v1/health
expected_behavior: Detects target repo via `gh repo view --json nameWithOwner`
Stops if target org is not LegalShield
Defaults reference repo to LegalShield/products-answers-service and reports the default
Fetches reference repo workflows via gh CLI
Stops and reports if any reference workflow fetch fails
Checks target repo for existing workflows, Dockerfile, global.json
Creates test.yml, build.yml, pr.yml, deploy.yml in .github/workflows/
Confirms derived URLs with user before writing into deploy.yml
Adapts AI summary diff paths to match target repo source directories
Adapts copilot prompt repo references to point to target repo
Adds teams as repo collaborators before creating environments
Creates sandbox, uat, production environments with correct reviewers
edge_cases: Must add teams as collaborators BEFORE assigning as environment reviewers
Must confirm derived health URLs with user before writing
